content:
1st International Workshop on Artificial Intelligence in Software Testing Co-located with ICST 2021
AIST will be virtual AIST will be held online on the 12th of April, 2021.  Details about the schedule and the platform will follow.
Important Dates  Submission deadline: 20 January 2021 AoE  Notification of Acceptance: 09 February 2021  Camera-ready: 20 February 2021   Paper Submission Papers are to be submitted via EasyChair in the following link:
https://easychair.org/conferences/?conf=aist21 See Call for Papers for more details.

title: AIST 2021
